narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Demand for advanced AI chips and related infrastructure continues to drive strong performance in semiconductor companies, as hyperscalers and enterprises invest heavily in AI capabilities.
watchFor: Hyperscaler capex cuts at next earnings
NVDA revenue growth decelerates below 20% QoQ
China export controls expand to HBM

narratives.name: AI Software & Cloud Adoption
narratives.thesis: Enterprises are rapidly adopting AI-driven software and cloud services, leading to strong revenue growth for companies providing these solutions, despite some individual stock pullbacks.
watchFor: Snowflake (SNOW) or Datadog (DDOG) report significant deceleration in product revenue growth
Microsoft (MSFT) Azure or Copilot growth disappoints
Major enterprise customers delay or cut AI software spending

narratives.name: AI-Optimized Server Demand
narratives.thesis: Strong demand for AI-optimized servers and related hardware is driving revenue growth for manufacturers, with significant contract wins and positive analyst sentiment.
watchFor: Major server OEM (e.g., DELL) reports weaker than expected AI server orders
Hyperscalers shift away from custom AI hardware to off-the-shelf solutions
Key component shortages (e.g., power supplies, cooling) limit server production

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The strong growth of GLP-1 drugs for weight loss and related conditions continues to drive positive sentiment and analyst upgrades for leading pharmaceutical companies.
watchFor: Unexpected negative clinical trial results for a leading GLP-1 drug
Increased competition from new entrants in the GLP-1 market
Regulatory changes impacting GLP-1 drug coverage or pricing

narratives.name: Semiconductor Equipment & Materials Buildout
narratives.thesis: The ongoing expansion of semiconductor manufacturing capacity, particularly for AI chips, is driving strong demand for equipment and materials, benefiting key players in the supply chain.
watchFor: TSM or other major foundries cut capex plans
New export controls on semiconductor equipment to China
Global chip oversupply concerns re-emerge

narratives.name: Aerospace & Defense Spending
narratives.thesis: Robust backlogs and new contracts are driving strong performance in the aerospace and defense sector, with companies benefiting from increased global defense spending and strategic partnerships.
watchFor: Major defense contract cancellations or delays
Significant de-escalation of global geopolitical tensions
General Dynamics (GD) reports weaker than expected backlog or order intake

narratives.name: AI Networking Trade
narratives.thesis: The massive data flows required by AI are driving upgrades and expansion in networking infrastructure, benefiting companies providing high-bandwidth and low-latency solutions.
watchFor: Hyperscalers announce insourcing of networking hardware development
Significant price compression in AI networking components
Cisco (CSCO) or Arista (ANET) report weaker than expected order growth for AI-related products

narratives.name: Auto Manufacturers Boost
narratives.thesis: Tesla is seeing a significant surge driven by positive robotaxi outlook and strong European EV sales, while the broader EV market continues to expand.
watchFor: Tesla (TSLA) robotaxi progress disappoints or faces regulatory hurdles
Significant slowdown in European EV sales growth
Increased competition from traditional automakers in the EV space

narratives.name: AI-Driven Commerce Growth
narratives.thesis: AI integration is enhancing e-commerce platforms and advertising, driving growth for companies leveraging these technologies to improve user experience and monetization.
watchFor: Meta (META) or Alphabet (GOOGL) report lower than expected ad revenue growth
New AI features fail to drive user engagement or monetization
Increased regulatory scrutiny on AI in advertising

narratives.name: Internet Content & Information Watchlist
narratives.thesis: AI monetization strategies are driving positive sentiment for some internet content and information companies, while others face valuation concerns despite strong performance.
watchFor: Meta (META) or Alphabet (GOOGL) report lower than expected ad revenue growth from AI initiatives
Reddit (RDDT) ARPU growth disappoints or user engagement declines
Increased regulatory scrutiny on AI in content moderation or advertising

narratives.name: Integrated Freight & Logistics Watchlist
narratives.thesis: FedEx is poised for growth with a planned spin-off and positive analyst upgrades, signaling a constructive outlook for the integrated freight and logistics sector.
watchFor: FedEx (FDX) spin-off faces unexpected delays or complications
Global trade volumes decline significantly
Increased fuel costs impact logistics profitability

narratives.name: Healthcare Plans Watchlist
narratives.thesis: UnitedHealth Group is seeing positive analyst sentiment and price target raises following a push for PBM transparency, indicating a constructive outlook for the managed care sector.
watchFor: Increased regulatory scrutiny on PBM practices leading to lower margins
Higher than expected medical loss ratios for health insurers
UnitedHealth (UNH) reports significant decline in membership

narratives.name: Banks - Diversified Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Diversified banks are anticipating strong Q2 trading revenue growth, signaling a positive outlook for the sector, despite some individual stock pullbacks.
watchFor: Bank of America (BAC) or Morgan Stanley (MS) report weaker than expected Q2 trading revenue
Unexpected increase in loan loss provisions across the banking sector
Federal Reserve signals a shift in monetary policy that negatively impacts bank net interest margins

narratives.name: Credit Services Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Credit services companies are seeing mixed performance, with some benefiting from strong earnings and analyst upgrades, while others face valuation concerns and acquisition-related declines.
watchFor: Visa (V) or Mastercard (MA) report weaker than expected transaction volumes
Capital One (COF) acquisition faces significant regulatory hurdles or integration issues
Consumer credit quality deteriorates significantly

narratives.name: Cybersecurity AI Integration
narratives.thesis: The integration of AI into cybersecurity solutions is critical for defending against evolving threats, but some companies face challenges in translating innovation into consistent revenue growth.
watchFor: Major cybersecurity breach at a leading AI-enabled security provider
Increased competition from new AI-native security startups
Customer pushback on pricing for AI-enhanced security features

narratives.name: Medical Devices Demand Slowdown
narratives.thesis: Boston Scientific is experiencing a significant stock decline due to weaker demand for a heart device and underwhelming growth guidance, indicating a potential slowdown in parts of the medical devices market.
watchFor: Boston Scientific (BSX) reports further deterioration in device demand
Broader medical device market shows signs of slowing growth
Increased regulatory hurdles for new medical device approvals

narratives.name: Asset Management Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Asset management firms are receiving positive analyst attention and price target raises, indicating confidence in their business models and growth prospects.
watchFor: Apollo (APO) reports weaker than expected AUM growth or fee-related earnings
Blackstone (BX) faces significant outflows or underperformance in key funds
Increased regulatory scrutiny on private equity or alternative asset managers

narratives.name: Internet Retail Watchlist
narratives.thesis: The internet retail sector is seeing mixed signals, with some platforms benefiting from AI integration while others face valuation concerns and competitive pressures.
watchFor: DoorDash (DASH) reports significant slowdown in order growth or user acquisition
Reddit (RDDT) ARPU growth disappoints or user engagement declines
E-commerce giants (e.g., AMZN) intensify competition in specific niches

narratives.name: Residential Construction Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Lennar is outperforming the market, indicating resilience in parts of the residential construction sector despite broader economic uncertainties.
watchFor: Mortgage rates rise significantly (e.g., 30-year fixed > 7.5%)
Housing starts or existing home sales data show steep declines
Lennar (LEN) reports weaker than expected forward orders

narratives.name: Specialty Retail Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Specialty retail is experiencing varied performance, with some companies showing resilience and strong execution while others face valuation questions and competitive pressures.
watchFor: Home Depot (HD) or Lowe's (LOW) report significant slowdown in same-store sales
Housing market downturn impacts demand for home improvement goods
Consumer discretionary spending shifts away from home goods

narratives.name: Entertainment Content Expansion
narratives.thesis: The entertainment sector is navigating challenges in streaming and content costs, with some companies showing resilience while others face valuation and growth concerns.
watchFor: Netflix (NFLX) reports significant subscriber churn or lower ARPU
Increased competition in the streaming market leads to price wars
Higher content production costs impact profitability for entertainment companies

narratives.name: Discount Stores Resilience
narratives.thesis: Walmart and Costco are facing scrutiny over their valuations post-earnings, with analysts offering mixed views despite strong underlying performance in grocery traffic and revenue growth.
watchFor: Walmart (WMT) or Costco (COST) report significant deceleration in same-store sales growth
Increased competition from online retailers or other discount formats
Consumer trade-down behavior intensifies, impacting margins

narratives.name: Household & Personal Products Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Estee Lauder is experiencing a rally and is considered undervalued by some metrics, indicating positive momentum in parts of the household and personal products sector.
watchFor: Estee Lauder (EL) reports weaker than expected sales growth or margin compression
Shift in consumer preferences away from premium beauty products
Increased competition from direct-to-consumer brands

narratives.name: Apparel Retail Resilience
narratives.thesis: Lululemon has resolved internal conflicts, but sales challenges persist, indicating a mixed outlook for the apparel retail sector.
watchFor: Lululemon (LULU) reports accelerating sales decline
Broader consumer spending on apparel weakens significantly
Increased promotional activity across the apparel retail sector

Technology.thesis: The AI capex cycle continues to be the dominant driver, with strong demand for semiconductors, server infrastructure, and AI-driven software. Hyperscalers are committing significant capital, and enterprise adoption of AI tools is accelerating, despite some valuation concerns.
watchFor: Major hyperscaler (MSFT, AMZN, GOOGL) capex guidance DOWN at next earnings
Core CPI print > 0.4% MoM for two consecutive months, forcing hawkish Fed repricing and duration risk
China export controls expand to advanced AI chips (HBM, leading-edge logic)

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: Consumer discretionary spending shows pockets of strength, particularly in travel as geopolitical tensions ease, but broader retail faces ongoing challenges and mixed sentiment. Auto manufacturers are seeing a boost from EV demand, while residential construction remains sensitive to interest rates.
watchFor: Hot core CPI print > 0.4% MoM, signaling persistent inflation and higher rates
Significant increase in unemployment rate (>4.5%) impacting consumer spending
Further escalation of geopolitical conflicts impacting travel sentiment

Communication Services.thesis: The communication services sector is mixed, with AI monetization strategies driving some internet content companies higher, while others face valuation scrutiny and competitive headwinds. Entertainment platforms are navigating content costs and subscriber growth challenges.
watchFor: Major internet content companies (META, GOOGL) report weaker than expected ad revenue growth
Netflix (NFLX) reports significant subscriber churn or lower ARPU
Increased regulatory pressure on social media or streaming platforms

Industrials.thesis: The Industrials sector is showing strength, particularly in Aerospace & Defense due to robust backlogs and new contracts, and in space-related industries benefiting from a 'SpaceX halo effect' and strategic milestones. Integrated freight is also seeing positive analyst sentiment.
watchFor: Significant cuts to defense budgets in major economies
Major geopolitical de-escalation reducing demand for defense products
Disruption in global supply chains impacting manufacturing and logistics

Healthcare.thesis: Healthcare is mixed; GLP-1 leaders continue to show strong growth and positive analyst sentiment, but other areas like medical devices face demand slowdowns and some healthcare plans are under scrutiny. The sector is also seeing innovation in AI-enabled solutions.
watchFor: Unexpected negative clinical trial results for a leading GLP-1 drug
Increased regulatory pressure on drug pricing or PBM practices
UnitedHealth (UNH) reports significant decline in membership or higher medical loss ratio

Financials.thesis: The Financials sector is mixed, with diversified banks showing anticipated trading revenue growth and asset managers receiving positive analyst upgrades. However, some credit services companies face valuation scrutiny and capital markets firms are seeing varied performance.
watchFor: Federal Reserve signals unexpected hawkish shift (e.g., rate hike guidance)
Significant increase in corporate or consumer loan defaults
Major regulatory changes impacting bank profitability or capital requirements

Consumer Defensive.thesis: The Consumer Defensive sector is showing mixed signals, with discount stores facing valuation questions despite strong performance, and household & personal products seeing momentum but also potential overvaluation concerns.
watchFor: Significant slowdown in consumer spending on staples
Unexpected rise in input costs impacting margins for consumer defensive companies
Walmart (WMT) or Costco (COST) report weaker than expected same-store sales

Utilities.thesis: The Utilities sector is showing positive momentum, particularly in independent power producers, with strong analyst ratings and price target raises, suggesting a constructive outlook.
watchFor: Significant increase in natural gas or other fuel prices impacting power generation costs
Unexpected regulatory changes impacting utility profitability or renewable energy incentives
Interest rates rise sharply, making utility dividends less attractive

Basic Materials.thesis: The Basic Materials sector is showing mixed signals, with some industrial metals companies facing valuation concerns despite strategic partnerships, while others are benefiting from broader market trends.
watchFor: Significant slowdown in global industrial production
Increased trade tensions impacting raw material demand or pricing
MP Materials (MP) reports weaker than expected rare earth demand or pricing

Precious Metals.thesis: Precious metals are experiencing a renewed safe-haven bid, with gold prices climbing due to geopolitical developments and potential inflation concerns, while silver also shows some positive momentum.
watchFor: Resolution of major geopolitical conflicts, reducing safe-haven demand
Stronger-than-expected economic data leading to hawkish Fed repricing
Significant strengthening of the US Dollar
